name: vardoger-analyze
description: Use when the user asks to personalize the GitHub Copilot CLI assistant, adapt Copilot to their style, use vardoger, or analyze their Copilot CLI conversation history.
intent_triggers: use the vardoger analyze agent skill
run a workflow for vardoger analyze
我需要處理 vardoger analyze 相關工作
幫我啟用 vardoger analyze 這個 skill
用 agent skill 完成 vardoger analyze

task.description: Natural-language task or instruction for the agent skill.

context_path.description: Optional workspace path or file context for the skill.

examples.intent: Use the vardoger analyze skill for this task.

error_codes.1: Skill invocation failed or required context was missing.
